rationale: Keep because the cited paper is a direct DOI-matched reference and is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core mechanism: stigmatized-group treatment in marketplace settings changing responses to price-related cues (expected discrimination reducing price sensitivity vs. discount cues triggering perceived disrespect). Given this conceptual overlap in focal constructs (stigmatized identity, discrimination/disrespect, price sensitivity/promotion response), it is not an obvious incidental mention.
